accurate.why: All claims align with the bill text and the contextual descriptions are accurate.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated or contradictory claims; figures and provisions match the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill's purpose of increasing trustee compensation, adjusting fees, and extending judgeships.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly names amended statutes including title 11 sec 330, title 28 sec 589a/1930, and the 2020 and 2017 Acts.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the filing-fee and indigent-waiver carve-outs and the conversion-to-chapter-7 condition.

effective_dates.why: Accurately describes the general effective date, the October 1 trustee rule, and fee application timing.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures all essential operative provisions across compensation, fees, and judgeships.

objective_tone.why: Neutral, descriptive tone without advocacy or editorializing.

coherent.why: Well-organized with clear sections and consistent content.

concise.why: Compact and free of padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: All named statutes, funds, and programs are correctly identified.
